prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 8322→7927→7852→10248→9977，2024 年因新高考选科调整位次大幅后移至 10248，2025 年小幅回升至 9977，近两年波动区间约 7800–10200；该校在安徽省物理类招生计划：2021 年 24 人、2022 年 26 人、2023 年 17 人、2024 年 14 人、2025 年 23 人；2026 年计划 27 人，较 2025 年扩招约 17.4%，招生名额增加将缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年第 46 名，近年排名稳中有升（2021 年第 44→2023 年第 40→2025 年第 46），综合实力处于全国中上水平；2024 年声誉评价偏正面（食堂改善）；2026 年声誉偏负面（校园安全事件）；抖音热度排名第 46（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，体育学 A-、药学 A-；材料科学与工程、临床医学、计算机等学科实力突出，与招生专业中的计算机、临床医学、纳米材料等高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气 工程等专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学热度稳定；安徽省 2026 年高考总人数约 45.1 万（较 2025 年约 46.2 万略降），物理类占比约 69%，估算物理类考生约 31.3 万（较 2025 年 32.1 万略降），考生总数微降对竞争有轻微缓解作用；苏州大学位于江苏，与安徽相邻，地域偏好较强；2025 年在安徽招生 17 人（占全国总计划 598 人的 2.84%），2026 年计划增至 27 人，安徽招生占比有所提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 9977、2026 年物理类扩招约 17.4%、考生总数微降、计算机/电子等热门专业持续高热等因素，扩招带来的竞争缓解效应略强于考生减少和热度上升的推高作用，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年小幅后移。预测最低位次约 11068 名，区间 10568–11568 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 8322→7927→7852→10248→9977. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection for the new Gaokao, the ranking significantly dropped to 10248, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 9977, with a fluctuation range of about 7800–10200 in the past two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province for Physics Category: 24 students in 2021, 26 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 23 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 27 students, an increase of about 17.4% compared to 2025, which will alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 46th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable and slightly rising ranking in recent years (44th in 2021→40th in 2023→46th in 2025), indicating a mid-to-upper level comprehensive strength nationwide. In 2024, reputation evaluation was slightly positive (improved cafeteria); in 2026, reputation was slightly negative (campus safety incidents). Douyin popularity ranking is 46th (relatively popular), with medium-to-high short video exposure. No obvious records of admission cutoff breaks. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Physical Education received A- and Pharmacy received A-. Disciplines such as Materials Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science are outstanding, highly correlated with the enrollment majors including Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, and Nanomaterials.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable popularity. The total number of Gaokao examinees in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 451,000 (slightly lower than about 462,000 in 2025), with Physics Category accounting for about 69%, estimating about 313,000 Physics Category examinees (slightly lower than 321,000 in 2025). The slight decrease in total examinees has a mild alleviating effect on competition. Soochow University is located in Jiangsu, adjacent to Anhui, with strong regional preference. In 2025, it enrolled 17 students in Anhui (accounting for 2.84% of the national total plan of 598), and in 2026, the plan increases to 27 students, raising the proportion of enrollment in Anhui.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9977, the 2026 Physics Category enrollment expansion of about 17.4%, a slight decrease in total examinees, and the continued high popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electronics, the competition alleviation effect from enrollment expansion is slightly stronger than the pushing effect from the decrease in examinees and increased popularity. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 11068, with a range of 10568–11568.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Clinical Medicine (5-Year Program)
- Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Software Engineering
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Robotics Engineering
- Communication Engineering
- Nanomaterials and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemistry
- Financial Mathematics
- Digital Economy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10568–11568, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<10568), you can focus on reaching for Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>11568), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings such as Nanomaterials and Technology and Chemistry.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 History Category (including Liberal Arts) minimum rankings approximately 1301→1272→1226→1308→1116, with 2025 ranking 1116 being the best in the past five years (smallest number), an improvement of about 192 places compared to 2024, showing a fluctuating but forward-moving trend; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui Province: 2021: 6 students, 2022: 8 students, 2023: 9 students, 2024: 9 students, 2025: 6 students; 2026 plan: 10 students, an increase of about 66.7% compared to 2025, which will significantly ease competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 46th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with comprehensive strength at the upper-middle level nationwide; reputation in 2024 was slightly positive (cafeteria improvements); reputation in 2026 was slightly negative (campus safety incidents); Douyin popularity ranking 46th (relatively popular); no records of admission gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Physical Education A-, Pharmacy A-; Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and other liberal arts disciplines have good strength, matching the enrollment majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Library and Information Science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended as relatively popular; total number of Gaokao candidates in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 451,000, with History Category accounting for about 30.6%, estimated at about 138,000 History Category candidates (slightly lower than 2025's 141,400), a slight decrease in total candidates slightly eases competition; Soochow University is located in Jiangsu, adjacent to Anhui, with strong regional preference; 2026 History Category plan increases from 6 to 10 students, significantly raising the proportion of Anhui enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1116, the significant 66.7% expansion of History Category in 2026, a slight decrease in total candidates, and moderate to high popularity of Law/Chinese Language and Literature, the competition relief effect from expansion is significant. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be noticeably lower than in 2025. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 1592, with a range of 1292–1892.
